action.reasoning: Observation: FP-MLP baseline stable at test AP~0.163 (best 0.1633 from iter7, recent 0.1630 with val AP reaching 0.1767 after 60 epochs). PyG still segfaults preventing GNNs. train.py truncated in workspace (no jsonl logging so poor curves), but run completed with masked loss/pos_weight/ReduceLROnPlateau working. Analysis: Morgan radius=2 limited; concat radius=2+3 (4096-dim FP) provides multi-scale structure for better AP on imbalanced bioassays without increasing compute much. Slight capacity bump (hidden=1024/layers=4), full non-truncated train.py with per-epoch jsonl metrics (loss/val_ap/lr), grad_clip, batching, 80 epochs + patience=15 will improve without NaNs or OOM. Decision: Rewrite model.py/train.py/predict.py for consistency (multi-radius FP, updated arch/defaults, complete robust code + logging), run training then submit_eval on best.pt for higher avg_precision.
